steps.title: Spot the location reference
steps.content: The first sentence establishes India as the country of origin for the Cheruku rasamu mango. The second sentence gives a production statistic that applies to that same location.

steps.title: Apply the location signal
steps.content:
The logical relationship is specification (location). The blank needs a transition anchoring the production statistic to the place just mentioned—India.
  • Choice A — "Hence,": signals a logical consequence, implying the production stat follows causally from the mango's origin, which it doesn't, so fails. ✗
  • Choice B — "There,": functions as a locative adverb pointing back to India, establishing where the 2018 production figure applies, so fits. ✓
  • Choice C — "In fact,": signals emphasis or a surprising clarification, but the production stat isn't being used to correct or emphasize the prior sentence, so fails. ✗
  • Choice D — "Specifically,": signals narrowing to a particular aspect of the prior claim; the production figure doesn't narrow the mango's origin—it reports output from that location, so fails. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
